basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Sr. Project Assistant, Project Director and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sr. Project Assistant, Project Director and More
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Sr. Project Assistant, Project Director and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 4 Sr. Project Assistant, Project Director and More posts. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Assistant, Project Director and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Age relaxation of 5% marks for SC/ST candidates is applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech in Automobile Engineering, 1st Class Post Graduate degree, Graduate degree
qualification.details: Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.): B. Tech in Automobile Engineering. Demonstrated experience in research and design of subtitle-based or audio-visual learning tools, with specific focus on readability, language presentation, and user engagement. Prior hands-on work in SLS, AniBooks, or similar literacy interventions, including content testing, design iteration, and documentation of research insights, is essential. Project Director: 1st Class Post Graduate degree in relevant discipline with minimum 15 years of experience in large-scale literacy, media, or language-focused programmes, with demonstrated experience working with government systems and broadcast platforms in India. Proven leadership in SLS or content-led reading initiatives across multilingual contexts, including programme design, scaleup, and stakeholder management especially in Arunachal Pradesh, is essential. Project Consultant: 1st Class Post Graduate degree in relevant discipline with minimum 10 years of experience in education, teacher training, and storytelling, with extensive fieldwork in indigenous or tribal communities in Northeast India, particularly with Community Based Organizations (CBOs) in Arunachal Pradesh. Demonstrated work in folklore documentation, children's literature, and development of pedagogical content for literacy programmes (including AniBooks or similar tools) and ability to relocate to Arunachal Pradesh is essential. Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.): Graduate degree with at least 5 years of experience in spanning education, technology, and community development, with sustained field engagement in Northeast India, particularly with Community Based Organizations (CBOs) in Arunachal Pradesh. Demonstrated experience in integrating storytelling, literacy interventions, and grassroots implementation, IT& operations, including work with indigenous communities and local knowledge systems, and ability to relocate to Arunachal Pradesh is essential.

salary_details.details: Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.): Rs. 47,790/- - Rs. 2,53,640/- Per Month Project Director: Rs. 47,790/- - Rs. 2,53,640/- Per Month Project Consultant: Rs. 47,790/- - Rs. 2,53,640/- Per Month Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.): Rs. 47,790/- - Rs. 2,53,640/- Per Month

selection_process: Short-listing of eligible candidates Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Project Appointments?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Appointments at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Project Appointments posts announced by IIT Delhi in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these Project Appointments ranges from Rs. 47,790/- to Rs. 2,53,640/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Appointments?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include B. Tech in Automobile Engineering, a 1st Class Post Graduate degree, and a Graduate degree, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Project Appointments?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Project Appointments.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT Delhi Project Appointments?
faq.answer: The selection process involves short-listing of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These are contract-based positions. The project duration is up to 31st January 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, a 5% relaxation of marks is provided for SC/ST candidates, though specific age limits are not detailed in the provided summary.
